scales.overline: text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-muted-foreground

surfaces_and_shadows.card: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-200
surfaces_and_shadows.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E2E8F0] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_shadows.comment_accent: border-l-4 border-[#3B82F6] bg-white rounded-r-md pl-4 py-3 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_shadows.input: bg-[#F1F5F9] border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#3B82F6] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3B82F6]/20 rounded-md transition-all duration-200

button.primary: bg-[#CC0000] text-white hover:bg-[#A30000] font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-[#F1F5F9] text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#E2E8F0] font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
button.ghost: hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] text-[#64748B] hover:text-[#0F172A] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
button.accent: bg-[#3B82F6] text-white hover:bg-[#2563EB] font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors

badge.discussion: bg-[#FF6B6B]/10 text-[#CC0000] border border-[#FF6B6B]/20 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badge.project: bg-[#3B82F6]/10 text-[#3B82F6] border border-[#3B82F6]/20 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold

components.post_card: flex flex-col gap-3 p-5 bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#3B82F6]/30 transition-all cursor-pointer

accessibility.contrast_check: Passes WCAG AA for normal text, APCA preferred

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the light theme constraints. Do NOT include any dark mode toggles or classes.
Use DM Sans for headings and Inter for body text as requested, utilizing the specific font sizes: 13px for mobile, 15px for desktop.
Implement hidden scrollbars globally by applying `scrollbar-width: none` (Firefox) and `::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }` (Chrome/Safari) to the root or main container.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages, user balances, confirmation texts, etc., using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'login-submit-button').
Post feed is only visible after login. Validate forms and show inline errors.
Implement Comments with soft left border accent (`comment_accent` style).
Build 'Discuss' as a PWA, include necessary manifest and service worker configuration.
Ensure the hero section on the landing page clearly uses the provided logo, tagline, and the hero_image as a background or side visual. Do not use placeholder text for logos.
Ensure 'Password change is not possible for now.' is shown on the Profile Page.
Buttons should have modern rounded corners ('rounded-md') and subtle hover scaling/colors. No retro styling.
Color Usage: Use #CC0000 primarily for brand actions/buttons, #FF6B6B for secondary/hover accents, #3B82F6 for links, tags or informative actions. Background MUST be #F8FAFC.
